question_enc: How many days of earned leave do employees get per year?
answer_enc: According to the Leave_Policy.pdf, all permanent employees receive 18 days of Earned Leave (EL) per calendar year. Leave accrues at 1.5 days per month.

question_enc: What is the WFH policy for confirmed employees?
answer_enc:
According to the WFH_Policy.pdf, confirmed employees who have completed their probation period (6 months) are eligible for Work From Home (WFH). The standard hybrid model allows for up to 2 WFH days per week. Key points for confirmed employees include:
* Eligibility: Completed probation period (6 months)
* WFH frequency: Up to 2 WFH days per week
* Core hours: Online during core hours (10:00 AM – 4:00 PM IST)
* Attendance: Mark attendance in HRIS every WFH day before 9:30 AM
* Productivity: Weekly status reports mandatory for employees on extended WFH (>3 months) 

Please note that additional WFH days require documented approval from the department head, and extended WFH (>3 months) requires HR and VP approval.

question_enc: How is EPF (Provident Fund) calculated and deducted from salary?
answer_enc:
According to the Payroll_Policy.pdf, the EPF (Provident Fund) calculation and deduction are as follows:
* Employee contribution: 12% of (Basic + DA)
* Employer contribution: 12% of (Basic + DA) — over and above CTC
* EPF account is created within 30 days of joining, and nomination must be updated in HRIS. 

This information provides the details on how EPF is calculated and deducted from the salary.

question_enc: What is the notice period after probation confirmation?
answer_enc:
According to the Onboarding_Policy.pdf, the notice period after probation confirmation varies based on the employee's level:
* For Individual Contributor (IC) level: 60 days
* For Manager and above: 90 days
Buyout is also allowed by paying the equivalent gross salary, and garden leave is at the company's discretion.

question_enc: What is the maternity leave entitlement at Zyro Dynamics?
answer_enc: According to the Leave_Policy.pdf, the maternity leave entitlement at Zyro Dynamics is 26 weeks of paid Maternity Leave, as per the Maternity Benefit Act, 1961. This benefit is available for up to 2 children. Additionally, adoptive mothers are entitled to 12 weeks of paid leave.

question_enc: What health insurance benefits are provided to employees?
answer_enc:
According to the Payroll_Policy.pdf, the health insurance benefits provided to employees include:
* Group Medical Coverage (GMC): Employee + Spouse + 2 dependent children, with a Sum Insured of Rs. 5,00,000 per family per year.
* Cashless hospitalisation at 5,000+ network hospitals.
* Pre-existing diseases covered from Day 1.
* Dental: Rs. 5,000/year.
* Vision: Rs. 3,000/year.
* Term Life Insurance: 3× Annual CTC (minimum Rs. 50 lakhs).
* Gym/Fitness reimbursement: Rs. 1,000/month.
* Mental health: Up to 5 free counselling sessions/year via EAP.
* Optional NPS with 10% employer contribution of Basic + DA.

question_enc: How is the performance rating scale structured?
answer_enc:
According to the Performance_Policy.pdf, the performance rating scale is structured as follows:
* 5 — Exceptional: Consistently and significantly exceeds expectations
* 4 — Exceeds Expectations: Frequently exceeds targets
* 3 — Meets Expectations: Consistently delivers on all targets
* 2 — Needs Improvement: Partially meets expectations
* 1 — Unsatisfactory: Fails to meet minimum expectations

question_enc: How do I claim business travel reimbursement?
answer_enc:
According to the Travel_Policy.pdf, to claim business travel reimbursement, you should:
* Submit your expense claim in HRIS within 15 days of return.
* Include receipts for all individual expenses above Rs. 500.
* Ensure that your claim is submitted within the specified timeframe, as claims after 30 days will not be processed.
* Reimbursement will be credited to your salary account within 15 working days.

Please note that you should have obtained pre-approval for your business travel from your department head and HR before embarking on your trip, as per the policy.

question_enc: What is the POSH policy and how do I report harassment?
answer_enc:
According to the Conduct_Policy.pdf, Zyro Dynamics has a zero-tolerance policy toward sexual harassment. The key points of the POSH (Prevention of Sexual Harassment) policy are:
* Zero-tolerance policy toward sexual harassment
* An Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) is established per the POSH Act, 2013
* Complaints must be filed within 3 months of the incident
* Anonymous reporting is available via the HR helpline

If you need to report harassment, you can file a complaint with the Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) or use the anonymous reporting option via the HR helpline.

question_enc: How is Full and Final (F&F) settlement calculated?
answer_enc:
According to the Onboarding_Policy.pdf, Full and Final (F&F) settlement includes:
* Unpaid salary
* Earned leave encashment
* Gratuity (if eligible)

Gratuity is payable after 5 years of continuous service. The F&F settlement is processed within 45 days of the last working day. Additionally, PF settlement is done via EPFO, which takes 15-30 days separately.
